description_for_human: Enterprise AI development platform with 75+ skills for Azure DevOps and Atlassian workflows. Four Claude Code plugins covering requirements, planning, execution, review, and PR creation — from ticket to PR, fully autonomous.
description_for_model: KAI is an enterprise AI development platform built as four Claude Code plugins (dx-core, dx-aem, dx-hub, dx-automation) providing 75+ skills and 13 specialized agents for structured software development workflows. It covers the full sprint lifecycle: requirements analysis from Azure DevOps/Jira tickets, Figma design-to-code pipelines, implementation planning, autonomous code execution with self-healing, 6-phase verification gates, and PR creation. Skills run identically across Claude Code, GitHub Copilot CLI, and VS Code Chat. Includes deep AEM (Adobe Experience Manager) specialization and 24/7 autonomous pipeline agents triggered by AWS Lambda webhooks.
